---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement, in-triage
assignees: JesseDocken

---

## Problem
 
Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What are you trying to accomplish that isn't currently possible or is harder than it should be?
 
## Proposed Solution
 
Describe how you'd like this to work. Include API examples if you have ideas about what the interface should look like.
 
```typescript
// Example of how the feature might be used
```
 
## Alternatives Considered
 
Describe any alternative approaches you've considered and why they don't fully solve the problem.
 
## Additional Context
 
Any other context — related issues, links to relevant discussions, use cases from your application, etc.
